news.title:
SMC Global reports no new share encumbrances by promoters and PACs for FY ending March 2026.
Pulin Investments holds 1.9cr shares with 1.1cr encumbered; Jai Ambey holds 9.7L shares with 6.5L encumbered.
news.summary:
SMC Global reports no new share encumbrances by promoters and PACs for FY ending March 2026.
Pulin Investments holds 1.9cr shares with 1.1cr encumbered; Jai Ambey holds 9.7L shares with 6.5L encumbered.

news.title:
SMC Global clarifies no material info behind volume rise, cites market-driven increase.
The company confirms normal operations and commitment to timely regulatory disclosures.
news.summary:
SMC Global clarifies no material info behind volume rise, cites market-driven increase.
The company confirms normal operations and commitment to timely regulatory disclosures.

news.title:
SMC Global Securities certifies timely interest payments for NCDs worth Rs.1497.6 lakhs.
Payments made on 2nd March 2026 due to 1st March being a bank holiday; details posted online.
news.summary:
SMC Global Securities certifies timely interest payments for NCDs worth Rs.1497.6 lakhs.
Payments made on 2nd March 2026 due to 1st March being a bank holiday; details posted online.

news.title:
SMC Global's Q3 income rose 12.4% QoQ to ₹494.8 cr; EBITDA at ₹102.1 cr, margin 20.6%.
PAT up 46.8% QoQ at ₹30.8 cr; broking revenue grew 17.3% YoY to ₹286.6 cr.
news.summary:
SMC Global's Q3 income rose 12.4% QoQ to ₹494.8 cr; EBITDA at ₹102.1 cr, margin 20.6%.
PAT up 46.8% QoQ at ₹30.8 cr; broking revenue grew 17.3% YoY to ₹286.6 cr.

news.title:
SMC Global Securities shared the Q3 FY25-26 earnings call audio on its website.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was discussed; transcript to follow on the company website.
news.summary:
SMC Global Securities shared the Q3 FY25-26 earnings call audio on its website.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was discussed; transcript to follow on the company website.

news.title:
SMC Global Securities Ltd reports stable quarterly performance, reversing prior negative trends.
Net sales and profits grow, but six-month profitability and debt levels pose challenges.
news.summary:
SMC Global Securities Ltd reports stable quarterly performance, reversing prior negative trends.
Net sales and profits grow, but six-month profitability and debt levels pose challenges.

news.title:
SMC Global Securities' Q3 EBITDA fell to 1B INR from 1.1B INR YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin dropped to 20.6% from 24.5% YoY.
news.summary:
SMC Global Securities' Q3 EBITDA fell to 1B INR from 1.1B INR YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin dropped to 20.6% from 24.5% YoY.

news.title:
SMC Global Securities reported no deviations in the use of proceeds from NCDs issued on Oct 30, 2025.
Funds raised were Rs 133.9 Cr with full utilization for working capital and corporate purposes as per the prospectus.
news.summary:
SMC Global Securities reported no deviations in the use of proceeds from NCDs issued on Oct 30, 2025.
Funds raised were Rs 133.9 Cr with full utilization for working capital and corporate purposes as per the prospectus.

news.title:
SMC Global Securities sets 6th Feb 2026 as record date for interim dividend.
Dividend details for FY 2025-26 will be available on the company website.
news.summary:
SMC Global Securities sets 6th Feb 2026 as record date for interim dividend.
Dividend details for FY 2025-26 will be available on the company website.

news.title:
SMC Global Securities schedules an earnings call on 3rd Feb 2026 at 4 PM IST.
Call to discuss Q3 FY26 results; details available on smcindiaonline.com.
news.summary:
SMC Global Securities schedules an earnings call on 3rd Feb 2026 at 4 PM IST.
Call to discuss Q3 FY26 results; details available on smcindiaonline.com.

news.title:
SMC Global Securities hits breakout above resistance with all-time high.
The stock shows higher highs, lows, rising EMA ribbon, and volume spike.
news.summary:
SMC Global Securities hits breakout above resistance with all-time high.
The stock shows higher highs, lows, rising EMA ribbon, and volume spike.

news.title:
SMC Global Securities' promoter group disclosed share sale under SEBI insider trading norms.
No acquisitions, only disposals were mentioned for regulatory transparency.
news.summary:
SMC Global Securities' promoter group disclosed share sale under SEBI insider trading norms.
No acquisitions, only disposals were mentioned for regulatory transparency.

news.title:
Jai Ambey Share Broking Ltd., a promoter group of SMC Global, disposed equity shares.
Disclosure under SEBI Insider Trading Regulations submitted to BSE and NSE by SMC Global.
news.summary:
Jai Ambey Share Broking Ltd., a promoter group of SMC Global, disposed equity shares.
Disclosure under SEBI Insider Trading Regulations submitted to BSE and NSE by SMC Global.

news.title:
Jai Ambey Share Broking Ltd. (promoter group of SMC Global Securities Ltd) sold 18,63,340 equity shares worth Rs. 15.94 crore.
The transaction was disclosed under SEBI Insider Trading Regulation 7(2) and occurred on NSE on 23-12-2025.
news.summary:
Jai Ambey Share Broking Ltd. (promoter group of SMC Global Securities Ltd) sold 18,63,340 equity shares worth Rs. 15.94 crore.
The transaction was disclosed under SEBI Insider Trading Regulation 7(2) and occurred on NSE on 23-12-2025.

news.title:
SMC Global Securities rose 2.2%, closing at 61.65 on Nov 27 despite financial challenges.
The stock shows recovery but has underperformed market benchmarks over the past year.
news.summary:
SMC Global Securities rose 2.2%, closing at 61.65 on Nov 27 despite financial challenges.
The stock shows recovery but has underperformed market benchmarks over the past year.

news.title:
SMC Global Sec's stock fell to 64.00, down 4.2, a 7.9 loss over 3 days.
Negative results for 4 quarters drive bearish sentiment, underperforming benchmark.
news.summary:
SMC Global Sec's stock fell to 64.00, down 4.2, a 7.9 loss over 3 days.
Negative results for 4 quarters drive bearish sentiment, underperforming benchmark.

news.title:
SMC Global approves 1:1 bonus issue, doubling equity shares with 10.47 Cr shares.
Record date set for Nov 14, 2025; allotment on Nov 17, 2025 by capitalizing reserves.
news.summary:
SMC Global approves 1:1 bonus issue, doubling equity shares with 10.47 Cr shares.
Record date set for Nov 14, 2025; allotment on Nov 17, 2025 by capitalizing reserves.
